expressions.english: to feel sorry about parting ways

to say goodbye to friends
to part ways with friends
to break up with one's girlfriend

How did you break up?
How did you say goodbye?
I did not know those two broke up.
The girlfriend I broke up with keeps contacting me.
expressions.notes:
자꾸 = repeatedly, again and again
연락 = contact
연락을 하다 = to contact; to call, text

expressions.korean: 생각보다 일찍 헤어져서 집에 일찍 왔어요.
expressions.english: We parted earlier than I thought, so I came home early.

expressions.korean: 제가 알기로는 그 사람 남편하고 헤어져 있대요.
expressions.english: As far as I know, that person parted ways with her husband.
expressions.notes:
제가 알기로는 = as far as I know
남편 = husband
-대요 = I heard that + S + V; They say + S + V

expressions.korean: 어제 친구들과 놀다가 헤어진 뒤에 서점에 갔어요.
expressions.english: After saying goodbye to my friends while hanging out, I went to the bookstore.

expressions.korean: 오랜만에 만났는데 이렇게 헤어지기 아쉽지 않아요?
expressions.english: This is the first time we've met in a long time, don't you feel sad to part like this?
expressions.notes:
오랜만에 = first time in a long period of time
만나다 = to meet (up)

expressions.korean: 어제 친구랑 싸우고 헤어져서 너무 기분이 안 좋아요.
expressions.english: Yesterday, I parted ways with a friend after we fought, so I really don't feel good.

expressions.korean: 어제 강남에서 헤어진 뒤로 석진 씨하고 연락이 안 돼요.
expressions.english: After I parted with Seokjin yesterday in Gangnam, I haven't been able to reach him.
expressions.notes:
-(으)ㄴ 뒤로 = after + V-ing, ever since + S + V-ed
연락이 안 되다 = can't reach + person, can't contact

expressions.korean: 오랜만에 친구들을 만났는데 다들 바빠서 금방 헤어졌어요.
expressions.english: I met my friends for the first time in a long time, but we parted ways soon after since everyone was busy.
expressions.notes:
바쁘다 = to be busy
금방 = soon, shortly; quickly

expressions.korean: 어제 김을 가다가 우연히 5년 전에 헤어진 남자친구를 만났어요.
expressions.english: I ran into my ex-boyfriend, who I broke up with 5 years ago, while walking on the streets.
expressions.notes:
5년 = 5 years
전 = before, ago
남자친구 = boyfriend

expressions.korean: 영수 씨는 대학교 때 4년간 사귀던 여자 친구하고 졸업하자마자 헤어졌대요.
expressions.english: I heard Young Soo broke up with the girlfriend that he dated for four years as soon as he graduated.
expressions.notes:
대학교 = university
때 = time
4년 = four years
(amount of time) + -간 = for, during
졸업하다 = to graduate
